attacking_style: Insufficient data on attacking patterns. Observations focus on defensive riding while in leader's jersey rather than offensive moves.
team_tactics: Limited evidence of team positioning support; appears to lack adequate protection in dangerous finale situations despite holding race lead.
terrain_preference: Unknown from available data. Observations only capture finale positioning issues rather than terrain-specific performance.
vulnerability: Exposed in technical finales and bunch positioning - crashed on consecutive days inside final kilometers despite wearing leader's jersey, suggesting poor positioning discipline or inadequate team protection.
key_patterns: Crashes in final 3km on consecutive days while in race lead (2 observations)
Positioning discipline problems in dangerous finale situations when needing defensive riding (2 observations)
Vulnerable when requiring protective positioning rather than offensive racing (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: back-to-back crashes while holding race lead suggest either positioning errors under pressure or insufficient team support in critical moments
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4
